title: DHCP pool exhaustion preventing Wi-Fi connections on Floor 17
description: None of the team members on Floor 17 can connect to the office Wi-Fi this morning. Laptops are stuck on 'Obtaining IP address' before failing. I suspect the DHCP scope for this subnet has run out of available addresses.
triage_reason_summary: Network-wide DHCP lease allocation failure affects an entire floor, mapping directly to IT002 network support.
triage_recommended_next_action: Check the DHCP server lease tables for Floor 17 VLAN, release expired leases, or expand the subnet IP address pool.

title: Docker Desktop container networking error after bridge update
description: After updating Docker Desktop on my macOS machine, my containers can no longer resolve any external internet addresses or reach local database services. The default docker0 bridge interface seems misconfigured.
triage_reason_summary: Software-level container virtualization and internal network troubleshooting is managed under IT002 software support.
triage_recommended_next_action: Reset Docker Desktop network settings, repair the vEthernet adapter interface, or reinstall the hypervisor backend.

title: Stale local DNS cache cache causing incorrect API routing errors
description: I updated our staging server DNS records yesterday, but my local development machine is still resolving the old IP address, resulting in database connection errors. I have tried flushing my DNS, but it still fails.
triage_reason_summary: DNS resolution and local client cache issues fall under IT002 network support.
triage_recommended_next_action: Verify upstream DNS records, check the client host file settings, and perform a deep flush of the OS and browser DNS cache.

title: Application crash: Microsoft Teams freezes during screen sharing
description: Whenever I click 'Share Screen' during a Teams presentation, the entire application freezes immediately and then crashes. I have cleared the Teams app cache and updated my graphics drivers, but the crash still happens.
triage_reason_summary: Individual application stability and collaboration software crash debugging is handled by IT002.
triage_recommended_next_action: Disable hardware acceleration in Teams settings, verify desktop environment display manager logs, or reinstall the Teams client.

title: Corporate proxy blocking outbound connections to AWS S3 endpoints
description: My data pipeline script is failing with a timeout error. Looking at the logs, all HTTPS requests to s3.amazonaws.com are being blocked by the security proxy with a certificate warning. I need this endpoint allowlisted.
triage_reason_summary: Proxy certificate filtering and domain allowlisting is managed by the IT002 network support team.
triage_recommended_next_action: Check proxy logs for blocked S3 URLs and update the network gateway policy to allow access for the developer subnet.

title: VLAN routing misconfiguration isolating engineering testing subnet
description: We cannot ping or access our hardware test bench devices from our workstation VLAN since the router upgrade last night. It seems the route table between VLAN 20 and VLAN 30 was omitted.
triage_reason_summary: Inter-VLAN routing failure blocking development and test benches is an urgent network issue under IT002.
triage_recommended_next_action: Inspect core switch routing tables, restore the missing access control lists (ACLs) and routes, and verify ping connectivity.

title: Network switch port flap causing intermittent wired drops in Room 4A
description: The ethernet port on the wall in Room 4A keeps disconnecting every few minutes. The connection light on the wall socket blinks green, goes amber, then turns off completely before repeating. WiFi works fine.
triage_reason_summary: Switch port status, cable connection, and physical interface flap debugging falls under IT002.
triage_recommended_next_action: Check the switch interface logs for port flaps, test the patch panel connection, or move the room connection to a different switch port.

title: Outlook mailbox synchronization failure on macOS client
description: My Outlook client on macOS has stopped downloading new emails. The status bar shows 'Sync Pending' indefinitely. I can receive emails on the web client, so the issue is localized to my desktop app.
triage_reason_summary: Mail application sync and local profile troubleshooting is routed to IT002 software support.
triage_recommended_next_action: Clear the local Outlook cache, delete and rebuild the offline ost/database file, or re-add the Exchange account.

title: Figma desktop client showing blank screen after loading web assets
description: When I open the Figma desktop application, it only displays a blank black window. The menu bar options are visible, but the workspace canvas doesn't render. Reinstalling the app did not fix the problem.
triage_reason_summary: Desktop application rendering and GPU hardware acceleration conflicts are handled by IT002 software support.
triage_recommended_next_action: Clear the Figma local app data cache directory and disable GPU acceleration in the app configuration settings.

title: Internal server SSL certificate mismatch warning for database admin tool
description: When accessing our db-admin tool on the internal network, Chrome blocks the page with an 'Invalid Common Name' warning. The certificate seems to be issued for localhost rather than the domain name.
triage_reason_summary: Web server SSL cert installation and host configuration falls under IT002 systems software.
triage_recommended_next_action: Generate a new internal CA certificate containing the correct Subject Alternative Name (SAN) and install it on the web server.

title: File permission denied error on corporate shared NAS volume
description: I am trying to upload our campaign assets to the marketing folder on the shared NAS network drive, but I keep getting a 'Permission Denied' or 'Write Access Required' error, even though I am in the marketing group.
triage_reason_summary: Network-attached storage (NAS) folder level permissions and ACL debugging is managed by IT002.
triage_recommended_next_action: Verify group permissions in Active Directory for the marketing share, and reset the inherited NTFS permissions on the target directory.

title: Antivirus software quarantining legitimate Python compile artifacts
description: Every time I compile my local Python scripts containing C-extensions, the corporate antivirus software immediately quarantines the compiled .pyd files as a 'generic malware' threat. This blocks my local testing.
triage_reason_summary: Antivirus client policy exceptions and endpoint agent settings are managed under IT002 system software.
triage_recommended_next_action: Inspect the security agent logs, add the developer local build directory to the scan exclusion path, and restore the quarantined files.

title: Stuck network print job blocking marketing brochure prints on Floor 18
description: The queue for the marketing team network printer has a PDF document stuck in the 'Deleting' state. No other jobs can process, and a long queue is building up. Can someone purge the print spooler?
triage_reason_summary: Print spooler jams and network printing pipeline issues are serviced by IT002.
triage_recommended_next_action: Log in to the print server, stop the spooler service, manually delete the stuck spl files, and restart the service.

title: IntelliJ license server connection timeout on developer subnet
description: My IntelliJ IDE is showing an activation error because it cannot reach our internal license server at license.corp.internal. This is blocking all developers on Floor 19 from compiling code.
triage_reason_summary: Internal license server connectivity and routing falls under IT002 software systems.
triage_recommended_next_action: Verify license server process status, check firewall routing tables for port 27017, and restart the license server service.

title: Git SSH connection timeout when pushing to internal server
description: When pushing commits to git.corp.internal, I get a 'Connection timed out' error over SSH. HTTPS pushes work fine, so the issue seems specific to the SSH port 22 access on the engineering subnet.
triage_reason_summary: SSH gateway access and port block issues belong in the IT002 network queue.
triage_recommended_next_action: Check the core network firewall rules for SSH port 22 to the Git server, and verify route tables for the subnet.

title: Terraform backend state lock error preventing deployment
description: Our CI/CD pipeline failed because our state file on AWS S3 is locked by an old running process. I need someone with administrative access to force unlock the state in our DynamoDB lock table.
triage_reason_summary: Infrastructure-as-code state management and state lock resolution is handled by IT002 DevOps support.
triage_recommended_next_action: Look up the lock ID in DynamoDB, verify no active pipeline is running, and run the terraform force-unlock command.

title: Corporate proxy blocking API requests to external test sandbox
description: Our application needs to call the Sandbox API at api-sandbox.paymentgateway.com, but the corporate gateway proxy blocks it with an SSL interception error. We need this API domain added to the bypass list.
triage_reason_summary: Proxy SSL interception exceptions and domain bypass configurations are managed by IT002.
triage_recommended_next_action: Configure the proxy server bypass list to allow direct outbound connections to the payment sandbox domain.

title: Bandwidth throttling or high latency on employee Wi-Fi in canteen
description: The employee Wi-Fi in the canteen area is extremely slow today. Ping times to internal servers are over 500ms and web pages fail to load. This makes it impossible to check mail or chats during lunch.
triage_reason_summary: Wireless access point load, bandwidth metrics, and canteen VLAN tuning belongs to IT002.
triage_recommended_next_action: Check client counts on the canteen APs, inspect bandwidth usage logs for hogging processes, and adjust QoS bandwidth limiters.

title: NTP synchronization drift causing authentication failures
description: My workstation clock is drifting and is currently 6 minutes behind real-time. This drift is causing Active Directory login handshakes to fail with a Kerberos time deviation error. I need to re-sync with the NTP server.
triage_reason_summary: Clock synchronization, NTP client drift, and local domain sync troubleshooting is an IT002 software issue.
triage_recommended_next_action: Reset the Windows Time service configuration, force a sync with time.windows.com, and check domain NTP group policy.

title: Citrix virtual desktop session frozen and unresponsive
description: My virtual desktop session has completely locked up. The mouse cursor doesn't move and keystrokes don't register. Closing the Citrix receiver window and logging back in just restores the same frozen state.
triage_reason_summary: Virtual desktop infrastructure (VDI) session management and stuck session termination falls under IT002.
triage_recommended_next_action: Locate the user's active session in the Citrix console, terminate it completely to clear the cache, and initiate a new login.

title: Log aggregation pipeline failure in Elastic logstash node
description: Our production logs are not appearing in Kibana. The logstash daemon is running out of memory due to a flood of syslog events from the network core. We need to allocate more heap space or drop debug logs.
triage_reason_summary: Monitoring stack failure, memory tuning, and log ingest pipelines are managed by IT002 systems software.
triage_recommended_next_action: Increase the JVM heap allocation on the logstash cluster nodes, filter out debug events, and restart the service.

title: Grafana dashboard metrics not updating due to Prometheus timeout
description: All panels on the database monitoring dashboard in the office display 'No Data'. The underlying Prometheus server is timing out while scraping targets on the staging network segment.
triage_reason_summary: Metrics server timeouts and scraping configuration falls under IT002 systems software support.
triage_recommended_next_action: Verify the Prometheus scrap configuration, check the network route to the targets, and restart the scraping engine.

title: Jira server response time degradation on office connection
description: Jira is taking over 30 seconds to load individual issue pages when connected from the office LAN, but works fine over cellular network. This suggests an issue with the DNS routing or proxy cache on the office network.
triage_reason_summary: Office gateway performance and application route latency is diagnosed by IT002.
triage_recommended_next_action: Inspect the office gateway proxy cache hit rate, check traceroutes to the Jira server, and flush proxy dns tables.

title: Corporate VPN client failing to establish tunnel on macOS Sonoma
description: After upgrading my MacBook to macOS Sonoma, the GlobalProtect VPN client fails to connect, showing a 'Security policy blocking connection' error. The system security permissions need adjustment.
triage_reason_summary: VPN client errors, macOS security framework changes, and driver compatibility belongs to IT002 software.
triage_recommended_next_action: Allow the GlobalProtect system extension in macOS System Settings under Security, and reinstall the VPN client if needed.

title: Local Postgres service failing to start due to lockfile block
description: My local PostgreSQL installation crashed, and now it refuses to restart, showing an error about a lockfile postmaster.pid already existing. I need assistance in safely removing the lock file and verifying database integrity.
triage_reason_summary: Local database service issues and lockfile debugging for development environments is managed by IT002.
triage_recommended_next_action: Delete the postmaster.pid lockfile, verify log outputs, and start the PostgreSQL database cluster service.

title: Blue Screen of Death (BSOD) loop on HR laptop after Windows patch
description: My corporate laptop installed updates last night and now it is stuck in a boot loop showing a Blue Screen of Death with the error code 'INACCESSIBLE_BOOT_DEVICE'. I cannot reach the desktop.
triage_reason_summary: Operating system boot failure and patch rollback is handled by IT002 software support.
triage_recommended_next_action: Boot into safe mode, uninstall the latest cumulative updates, rebuild the boot sector configuration, and check disk health.

title: Linux GRUB bootloader menu missing after dual-boot installation
description: I tried to set up dual-boot on my test laptop, but now the machine boots directly into Windows without displaying the GRUB bootloader menu. I cannot boot into Ubuntu to run my tests.
triage_reason_summary: Bootloader recovery and partition configuration falls under IT002 system software.
triage_recommended_next_action: Boot from an Ubuntu live USB, run boot-repair to reinstall the GRUB bootloader in EFI system partition, and update GRUB configurations.

title: Shared network drive folder disconnecting after sleep mode
description: Whenever my laptop wakes up from sleep mode, my mapped network drives show a red cross and are inaccessible until I manually disconnect and map them again. This is very tedious.
triage_reason_summary: Network drive mapping persistent settings and network reconnect scripts are managed by IT002.
triage_recommended_next_action: Update registry settings to delay network drive persistence checks, and verify NIC power management sleep settings.

title: Antivirus scanning engine causing 100% CPU spikes during meetings
description: The corporate security agent runs full disk scans in the middle of the workday, causing my CPU utilization to spike to 100% and freezing my web camera during video calls. Can we schedule these scans for overnight?
triage_reason_summary: Security agent scanning schedules and policy settings belong in IT002 system software.
triage_recommended_next_action: Modify the antivirus agent scan policy group policy to trigger full system scans outside core working hours (e.g., 9 PM to 6 AM).

title: Developer subnet unable to pull node base images from Docker Hub
description: Our CI runner is throwing a timeout error while pulling node:18-alpine from Docker Hub. Other subnets can pull normal images, so this looks like a gateway restriction specific to the developer VLAN.
triage_reason_summary: CI network gateways and container registry proxy settings are troubleshooting by IT002.
triage_recommended_next_action: Examine firewall logs for traffic from CI runners to Docker registry domains, and verify outbound NAT configs.

title: Corporate Slack client notification delays on macOS Sonoma client
description: I am experiencing delays of up to 10 minutes for Slack message notifications on my desktop. I receive them on my phone instantly, but the macOS desktop app notification daemon seems hung.
triage_reason_summary: Desktop client app notification settings and helper daemon crashes fall under IT002 software.
triage_recommended_next_action: Restart the macOS Notification Center agent service, check Slack notification permission settings, and clear application cache.

title: Local virtual host settings causing redirect loops in local Apache
description: After configuring a new local Apache virtual host for our intranet development, accessing dev.intranet.local results in an infinite HTTP 301 redirect loop. I need someone to check my rewrite rules.
triage_reason_summary: Local web server configuration and rewrite rule debugging is routed to IT002 software support.
triage_recommended_next_action: Inspect the Apache virtual host config file and .htaccess rewrite rules, fix the loop condition, and restart Apache.

title: Network latency spikes during file transfers to cloud backup
description: Our file backup scripts start transferring raw archives to the cloud at 3 PM, which completely saturates our office bandwidth. All Zoom calls drop packets. We need to schedule this for after-hours.
triage_reason_summary: Bandwidth saturation and script execution schedules are managed by IT002.
triage_recommended_next_action: Reschedule the backup cron job to run at midnight, or apply bandwidth limits to the backup tool traffic on the gateway.
